MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-04-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:

Robert Cohen, Esq. for and with Plaintiff Aurora Loan Services LLC. and with John Farrell.
F. Sharee Hess, Esq. as limited scope counsel for and with Defendant Benson Wong.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 503B, for settlement discussions.
Case settled, trial date vacated.
Stipulation for entry of judgment and Judgment by stipulation filed in court.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

BENSON WONG, TEL. NO. 216-8029, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. DEFENDANT BENSON WONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ANSWER TO BE FILED BY JANUARY 5, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)
